headline: API Gateway
description: An API Gateway is a single entry point for all client requests to a microservices architecture. It handles cross-cutting concerns: authentication, rate limiting, request routing, protocol translation, caching, logging, and API composition.

citation.name: API Gateway and Service Mesh: A 2025 Practical Guide
citation.author: multiple

citation.name: Microservices Gateways and Service Mesh: 2025 Architecture Survey
citation.author: multiple
